name: Broken — Capture Field Typo
description: Fixture for PR 2 validator tests. Captures the result of a create_contact call as `newContact`, then downstream references {{newContact.fullName}} — a field that does NOT exist on ContactRecord (the typed returns shape from crm.tools.ts). The real field is `firstName` + `lastName`. Expected validator output: `unresolved_interpolation` issue pointing at {{newContact.fullName}}, with a message that ContactRecord has no `fullName` field. This is the exact drift class the audit says the validator is shipping to catch.
